overall.description: Nighttime drive through a wet urban intersection in a video game city, passing an iconic donut shop and approaching a lit airport terminal with prominent neon signage. The scene features reflective asphalt, palm trees, and moderate vehicle traffic under artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection approach with iconic donut shop

events.description: vehicles passing through the intersection from left and right directions

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection in a vehicle, moving from the sidewalk area into the crosswalk

entered.detail: single-story building with giant illuminated donut sculpture on roof
tall red neon sign with white lettering on airport terminal building
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
red traffic signals suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a nighttime urban intersection, approaching from the sidewalk near a distinctive donut shop with a giant illuminated sign. The camera moves forward onto the crosswalk toward a large airport terminal with a prominent red 'FELIX' sign visible in the distance, while sparse traffic moves through the intersection.

events.description: slight right turn while continuing forward through the intersection
black SUV passes quickly on the right side of the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing through the intersection, steering slightly right while maintaining forward momentum

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving perpendicular through the intersection, passing close to the camera

entered.detail: metal tram or train tracks embedded in the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: Moving through the center of the wide intersection, the camera turns slightly right as a black SUV passes nearby. The donut shop recedes behind on the left while metal rail tracks become visible in the road ahead, and the Felix sign grows larger in the center view.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with embedded rail tracks

agents.ego_description: continuing straight toward the airport terminal area, crossing over the rail tracks

entered.detail: tall street lights with multiple lamps illuminating the road
low-rise commercial structure with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the far side of the intersection, with prominent rail tracks crossing the asphalt in the foreground. The Felix sign continues to dominate the center view while growing closer, and additional street lighting becomes visible on the left as the camera continues toward the airport terminal area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet nighttime intersection that transitions from a roadside storefront toward a brightly lit airport terminal. It begins on the sidewalk near a distinctive donut shop with a giant illuminated sign, moving forward across the crosswalk as sparse traffic flows through the urban junction. As the camera advances into the center of the wide intersection, the donut shop recedes to the left and a black SUV passes by, while the distant red Felix sign grows larger in the frame. The scene then shifts toward the far side of the intersection, where metal rail tracks emerge across the reflective asphalt in the foreground. Finally, the camera continues its approach toward the airport terminal area, with the dominating Felix sign and additional street lighting on the left becoming increasingly prominent.
